{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nishinamino Shrine'''|西奈弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
